mapper.select: select id, title, summary, location, poster_url, start_time, end_time, max_participants, status from campus_activity order by start_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_activity (title, summary, location, poster_url, start_time, end_time, max_participants, status) values (#{title}, #{summary}, #{location}, #{posterUrl}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{maxParticipants}, #{status})
mapper.update: update campus_activity set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, location = #{location}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from campus_activity_registration where activity_id = #{activityId} and status = 'REGISTERED'
select id, activity_id, user_id, real_name, student_no, phone, status, registered_at from campus_activity_registration where activity_id = #{activityId} order by registered_at desc
select id, activity_id, user_id, real_name, student_no, phone, status, registered_at from campus_activity_registration where activity_id = #{activityId} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select id, activity_id, user_id, real_name, student_no, phone, status, registered_at from campus_activity_registration where user_id = #{userId} order by registered_at desc
